name: FullRange
description: A hook that provides full-range liquidity provision similar to Uniswap V2. Liquidity is provided across the entire price range (MIN_TICK to MAX_TICK). The hook mints ERC20 liquidity tokens (UniswapV4ERC20) representing the LP's share of the pool. Includes automatic fee accrual tracking and a rebalance mechanism that reinvests fees into liquidity.
whenToUse: Use when you want to offer V2-style full-range liquidity provision in V4. This is ideal for stable asset pairs, beginner-friendly LPing, or protocols that want simpler liquidity provision mechanics. Also serves as a building block for oracle pools.
